title: Suvarnabhumi Airport -- Arrival Board
content:
[![flickr photo](http://farm1.static.flickr.com/127/417886688_652dd956b3_m.jpg)](http://www.flickr.com/photo_zoom.gne?id=417886688&size=o)

The only spot I can really read the whole sign is inside the arrival area, which I cannot go in (arriving passenger only). So what is the point of such a big and expensive sign?

Ahhhh ... corruption. :

(Picture quality is not the best but I hope you get the idea.)
